title: Marketing mobile product links — seamless header integration
description:
PipeShare and PipeSync on the Horizon Pipe marketing site now sit inline in the mobile header (compact Share / Sync chips before the menu icon) and as normal rows in the slide-out menu. The separate sticky bar under the header was removed so the layout feels native to the site.

Who is affected: mobile visitors on marketing/horizonpipe pages on pipeshare.live and horizonpipe.com.
changeLog: Removed separate mobile sticky product bar below header.
Share and Sync chips integrated into mobile header row before hamburger.
PipeShare and PipeSync menu rows match Home / About / Services styling.
Desktop PIPE SHARE / PIPE SYNC header links unchanged.
